name: creddump7
title: creddump7
summary: Python tool to extract credentials and secrets from Windows registry hives
description:
Python tool to extract credentials and secrets from Windows registry hives
This package contains a Python tool to extract various credentials and
secrets from Windows registry hives.
It's based on the creddump program. Many patches and fixes have been applied
by Ronnie Flathers.

commands.name: creddump7
commands.description: creddump7 - Python tool to extract credentials and secrets from Windows registry hives
